ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spectrometry_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrometry data entry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or identifier for the sample */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was collected */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., reference material, sample) */,
  "ybO_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for YbO */,
  "zr2O_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for Zr2O */,
  "hfo_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for HfO */,
  "pb204_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for Pb204 */,
  "bkgrnd_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for background */,
  "pb206_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for Pb206 */,
  "pb207_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for Pb207 */,
  "pb208_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for Pb208 */,
  "u238_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for U238 */,
  "tho248_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for ThO248 */,
  "uo254_total_cps" REAL /* Total counts per second for UO254 */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the data was collected */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the measurement */,
  "sample_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sample in grams */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the measurement was taken in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during the measurement in percentage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations during the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectrometry_data_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectrometry_data_material_type FOREIGN KEY ("material_type") REFERENCES materials ("material_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectrometry_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., reference material, sample) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or supplier of the material */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity level of the material in percentage */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the material is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrometry data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectrometry_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrometry data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectrometry_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrometry data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the readme file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectrometry_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lab */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the lab */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the lab director */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_materials" (
  "lab_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab-material association */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the material was collected or used in the lab */,
  "collector" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the material */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_materials_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrometry data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectrometry_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name or model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)
